title: DOME Registry User Schema v2
description: JSON Schema defining the structure of a DOME Registry user account. ORCID iD is the primary key and the attribution link used in all entry and version documents. All PII fields (email, givenName, familyName) are stored server-side only and never exposed in public API responses.

_id.description: [SYSTEM] MongoDB internal document ID. NOT used as a reference from entry documents — use orcid instead.

orcid.description: ORCID iD in 16-digit grouped format, e.g. 0000-0002-1825-0097. Primary key. Unique. Used as the attribution link in RegistryDocument.user and VersionDocument.editedBy.

displayName.description: Publicly visible display name, e.g. 'Gavin Farrell'. Shown on entry attribution. User-editable; initially populated from ORCID profile (givenName + familyName).

givenName.description: [PII] Given (first) name. Populated from ORCID profile on login. Never returned in public API responses.

familyName.description: [PII] Family (last) name. Populated from ORCID profile on login. Never returned in public API responses.

email.description: [PII] Email address. Optional — only populated if the user grants ORCID email scope. Refreshed on login. Used for notifications only. Never returned in public API responses.

organisation.description: Self-reported affiliation. Free-text, user-editable. Used for analytics.

roles.description: Access roles. Array to allow multiple simultaneous roles (e.g. user + journal_owner). Roles: user (default), admin (full system access), journal_owner (manage assigned journal queues).

journalAssignments.description: Journals this user is assigned to manage as a journal_owner. Populated by admins.

assignedByOrcid.description: ORCID iD of the admin who assigned this journal ownership.

assignedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the assignment was made.

dailyLLMCalls.description: Number of DOME Copilot (LLM) calls made today. Reset to 0 at midnight UTC.

dailyLLMResetAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last daily LLM quota reset.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of account creation (first successful ORCID login / upsert).

lastLoginAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of most recent ORCID login. Updated on every successful OAuth callback.
